title: Why Inflammation Is the Root of Aging (And How to Address It Naturally)
tags: inflammation, aging, curcumin, women over 40, anti-inflammatory, longevity, cellular health, inflammaging
summary: Chronic low-grade inflammation, known as inflammaging, is a primary driver of biological aging in women over 40, and curcumin delivered in liposomal form is one of the most research-backed tools to address it.
featured_image_alt: Woman walking outdoors in nature, supporting anti-inflammatory lifestyle after 40
